meaning: adj.借贷的,租赁的n.租赁权,租赁,租赁期,租赁物
examples: I went into a leasehold property at four hundred and fifty dollars rent per year.
People owning leasehold homes will be given a new right to buy the freehold of their property.
If we need capital only, can to the bank leasehold.
Eligible property includes designated leasehold improvements, certain restaurant buildings and improvements and certain retail space improvements.
The management company, by virtue of the HMA, acquires a leasehold interest in the hotel.
